title: piriqueta tamberlikii subsp. rotundifolia
intro: Piriqueta tamberlikii subsp. rotundifolia is a type of flowering plant in the Passifloraceae family, commonly known as the round-leaf piriqueta, a perennial species native to South America. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Piriqueta tamberlikii subsp. rotundifolia include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, teas, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
